name: Foremost Clean Energy Ltd.
description: Foremost Clean Energy Ltd. is a Canadian exploration company focused on acquiring and developing high-quality critical energy properties. The company holds a diverse portfolio of lithium properties in Manitoba, Canada, including the Zoro, Jean Lake, Grass River, and Peg North properties, as well as uranium exploration projects in the Athabasca Basin of Saskatchewan. Foremost is dedicated to fueling the clean energy transition by exploring for and producing the essential minerals required for modern battery technologies and clean power generation.
